name: Simple Mandala for Beginners
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: an easy circular mandala with big open shapes radiating from the center, a ring of large rounded petals around a plain circle, a ring of simple teardrops outside that, and a scalloped outer edge, lots of empty space to color

name: Flower Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a floral mandala built from repeating daisy and rose blooms arranged in symmetrical rings, curling leaves and vines filling the gaps, a single open flower at the very center, balanced and even all the way around

name: Heart Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a mandala made of repeating hearts radiating outward, an inner ring of small hearts around a central heart, a middle ring of medium hearts joined by curved lines, and an outer ring of large hearts with tiny dot details between them

name: Sun Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a radiant sun mandala with a calm smiling face in the center circle, alternating long pointed and short wavy rays around it, a ring of small dots and swirls, and a decorative scalloped border

name: Geometric Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a precise geometric mandala built from triangles, diamonds, hexagons, and straight lines arranged in perfect symmetry, an angular star at the center, concentric rings of repeating polygons, sharp and structured

name: Star Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a mandala built around stars, a large eight-pointed star at the center, rings of smaller five-pointed stars radiating outward, fine connecting lines and small dots filling the spaces between the star points

name: Lotus Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a lotus mandala with layered rows of pointed lotus petals opening outward from a small seedpod center, each petal lined with delicate inner veins, surrounded by a ring of tiny buds and a simple circular border

name: Cute Animal Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a playful kid-friendly mandala with a smiling cartoon cat face in the center, a ring of little paw prints, a ring of fish and bones, and an outer ring of rounded petals, cheerful and easy to color

name: Mandala Center Close-Up
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a close-up of the heart of a mandala filling the whole frame, a small intricate flower in the very middle surrounded by a few enlarged rings of detailed petals, dots, and curved lines, with the pattern fading off the edges

name: Butterfly Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a mandala made of butterflies arranged in a circle, their wings meeting wing-tip to wing-tip to form a continuous ring, patterned wings with swirls and dots, a small round flower at the center they all face

name: Intricate Detailed Mandala
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a highly intricate mandala packed with fine repeating detail, many concentric rings of tiny petals, paisley swirls, lace-like loops, beaded dots, and lattice patterns, dense and ornate all the way to a delicate filigree border

name: Mandala Color-by-Number
subject: patterns/mandala
prompt: a clear circular mandala with each section marked by a small printed number for a color-by-number activity, simple rings of petals and shapes with roomy areas, a tidy numbered key boxes arranged neatly in one corner
